news.title: AI Updates Today (March 2026) – Latest AI Model Releases
news.snippet: Version releases, API changes, and improvements for GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and 500+ language models. Major contributors include OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, Mistral AI, xAI, DeepSeek, Alibaba and many others.

news.title: Agentic AI is Set to Dominate in 2026: Get Ready for the Revolution
news.snippet: Microsoft set the tone by declaring 2025 the start of human-agent collaboration inside Microsoft 365, rolling out role-based assistants that can look up information, complete tasks like scheduling or onboarding, and then hand off results to users.

tech.title: RAG in 2026: Bridging Knowledge and Generative AI
tech.snippet: RAG systems integrate up-to-date information from data sources without the need for retraining, ensuring that AI outputs are always up-to-date – an essential feature in always evolving enterprise environments.

tech.title: Prompt Engineering - Wikipedia
tech.snippet: In 2025, 'vibe coding' was the Collins Dictionary word of the year. Context engineering is a related process that focuses on the context elements that accompany user prompts, including system instructions, retrieved knowledge, tool definitions, conversation summaries, and task metadata.
